name: Otake Corporation
summary: Otake Corporation engages in sale of pipework, housing, and air conditioning equipment. It offers valves, fittings, pipes, meters and gauges, support hardware products, housing equipment supplies, and plumbing machine tools. The company also provides polyurea and mouse shield products. Its products are used in chemical industry plant, general building, and housing equipment. The company was formerly known as Otake Shoten Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Otake Corporation in 1988. Otake Corporation was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
